qualSupplementItems.question: Please describe your foreign-focused interests or experiences (such as professional/academic/personal background, hobbies, extracurricular activities, travel, course work, languages, etc).
Occupations in the Directorate of Operations enable CIA’s foreign-focused mission. Give an example of how the above foreign interests or experiences have influenced your desire to join the DO.
In your own words, describe your understanding of the Directorate of Operations.
Have you previously interviewed with the Directorate of Operations (Yes/No)? If so, please include new information about you that you consider relevant.

Please tell us about a time when you had to “think on your feet” and describe a separate situation when you had to keep a level head while under pressure. What were each of those situations and how did you handle them?
Describe a time when you did not succeed, professionally or academically, and what you learned from that experience. (2 paragraphs)
